MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq. (415) 593-0077 for Defendant and Cross Complainant Stepping
Douglas B. Provencher, Esq., Provencher & Flatt LLP (707) 284-2380 for Cross Defendant and Opposing Party Molalla Holdings, Inc. and Head
RULING:
A R G U E D; CROSS DEFENDANT MOLALLA HOLDINGS, INC. AND ANTHONY HEAD'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel are ordered to file additional simultaneous briefs no later than 10/29/04, 4 pages in length, regarding the issue of whether the declaration under case law is sufficient to establish a probability of success. (301/AJR/AC) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq. (415) 593-0077 for Defendant and Moving Party Stepping
